content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 OnTheGoSystems: Senior Ruby on Rails Developer Anywhere in the World Nevada Ruby on Rails and Artificial Intelligence (AI) Back-End Programming Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/2344/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://onthegosystems.com">http://onthegosystems.com</a> </p> <p>We’re looking for a <strong>Senior Ruby on Rails developer</strong> with a curious, hands-on mindset who enjoys building reliable systems, owning meaningful features, solving complex problems, and <strong>using AI tools</strong> to improve development workflows, product quality, and user experience.</p> <h3>What you’ll be working on:</h3> <ul> <li> <p>Building and maintaining Ruby on Rails systems used at scaleOwning features from implementation to production</p> </li> <li> <p>Writing and maintaining automated tests (unit, integration, E2E)</p> </li> <li> <p>Investigating production issues, debugging complex problems, and helping design practical solutions</p> </li> <li> <p>Improving performance, reliability, and maintainability</p> </li> </ul> <h3>What we’re looking for:</h3> <p>To succeed in this role, you’ll have:</p> <ul> <li> <p>4+ years of professional experience with Ruby on Rails</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience building and running production systems</p> </li> <li> <p>Strong backend skills, including databases, performance, and API design</p> </li> <li> <p>Solid experience writing and maintaining automated tests (including E2E)</p> </li> <li> <p>Curiousity about AI technologies and use AI-powered tools to improve productivity, debugging, testing, research, or development workflows.</p> </li> </ul> <p>Nice to have:&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li> <p>Experience with React&nbsp;</p> </li> <li> <p>CI/CD, background jobs, or AWS experience</p> </li> </ul> <h3>Why Join <a href="https://onthegosystems.com/">OTGS</a>?</h3> <ul> <li> <p>Stable &amp; self-funded: Founded in 2007, profitable, and independent.</p> </li> <li> <p>Industry leaders: Creators of <a href="https://wpml.org/">WPML</a>, the #1 multilingual plugin for WordPress, used on 1.5M+ sites</p> </li> <li> <p>Fully remote, async-friendly: Work from anywhere within EMEA hours</p> </li> <li> <p>Engineering-driven culture: Ownership, autonomy, testing, and thoughtful problem-solving</p> </li> <li> <p>Fair compensation and great benefits: Designed to support your well-being both inside and outside of work.</p> </li> </ul> <h3>You’ll enjoy this role if you:</h3> <ul> <li> <p>Take pride in ownership and accountability</p> </li> <li> <p>Care about testing and long-term code quality</p> </li> <li> <p>Are motivated by solving problems in complex systems</p> </li> <li> <p>Enjoy collaborative environments where kind and experienced people learn, investigate issues, and solve problems.</p> </li> </ul> <p><strong>Want to make a lasting impact on a product used by thousands of real customers? We would love to hear from you.</strong></p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/onthegosystems-senior-ruby-on-rails-developer-2">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/onthegosystems-senior-ruby-on-rails-developer-2</a></p> Tue, 19 May 2026 06:26:21 +0000 Thu, 18 Jun 2026 06:26:21 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/onthegosystems-senior-ruby-on-rails-developer-2 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/onthegosystems-senior-ruby-on-rails-developer-2 Blink Health: Lead Product Designer Anywhere in the World Design Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United States </p> <div class="job__description body"><div><p><strong>Company Overview:</strong></p><br><p><a href="https://www.blinkhealth.com/">Blink Health </a>is the fastest growing healthcare technology company that builds products to make prescriptions accessible and affordable to everybody.&nbsp; Our two primary products – BlinkRx and Quick Save – remove traditional roadblocks within the current prescription supply chain, resulting in better access to critical medications and improved health outcomes for patients.&nbsp;</p><br><p><a href="https://www.blinkhealth.com/blinkrx">BlinkRx </a>is the world’s first pharma-to-patient cloud that offers a digital concierge service for patients who are prescribed branded medications. Patients benefit from transparent low prices, free home delivery, and world-class support on this first-of-its-kind centralized platform. With BlinkRx, never again will a patient show up at the pharmacy only to discover that they can’t afford their medication, their doctor needs to fill out a form for them, or the pharmacy doesn’t have the medication in stock.&nbsp;</p><br><p>We are a highly collaborative team of builders and operators who invent new ways of working in an industry that historically has resisted innovation. Join us!</p></div><div><p>As Lead Product Designer at BlinkRx, you will support the day-to-day design needs of a cross-functional product team and drive alignment across multiple product areas. You’ll partner closely with stakeholders, product managers, engineers, and other product designers to help define and execute on BlinkRx’s overall product vision and strategy. You’ll be a vocal advocate for all segments of users and customers and consistently deliver intuitive, well-crafted user experiences for BlinkRx products.</p><br><p><strong>Responsibilities:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Craft a modern, engaging user experience that solves both user and business needs.</li><br><li>Organize and facilitate collaborative work sessions and design thinking exercises that span multiple teams or departments.</li><br><li>Utilize user research insights and data analysis to inform design decisions, as well as identify where additional data and research are needed.</li><br><li>Propose and concept new product opportunities that are additive to product strategy and provide value to all patient and user segments.</li><br><li>Define interaction patterns, user flows, and complex information architecture models that support the end-to-end user journey through our products.</li><br><li>Generate low, medium, and high-fidelity wireframes, mockups, and prototypes for products and user interfaces.</li><br><li>Conduct a basic level of generative and evaluative user research including moderation of user sessions, synthesizing feedback, and sharing insights for broader team consumption and action.</li><br><li>Document all product design work, including detailed UI specifications, UX decision making and supporting rationale, and user interview
